name: Ua Withya Public Company Limited
summary: Ua Withya Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes galvanized steel structures, electricity poles, telecommunication poles, and electricity sub-stations in Thailand. The company also provides galvanizing services; and distributes power transmission equipment. In addition, it is involved in the operation of biomass, solar, and biogas power plants. Further, the company manufactures and sells agricultural products and woodchips, as well as sells industrial products. Ua Withya Public Company Limited was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
